spine.zh: 一个随每节课长大的迷你 agent。
spine.en: A tiny agent that grows each lesson.

thesis.zh: 所有 agent 都是同一个循环，逐个机制叠上去。
thesis.en: Every agent is the same loop, with one mechanism stacked on at a time.

archDiagram.diagram:
flowchart TD
  index["index.ts CLI"] --> loop["loop.ts 循环"]
  prompt["prompt.ts 系统提示词"] --> loop
  loop --> model["model.ts 调模型"]
  loop --> tools["tools.ts 读写工具"]

summary.zh: 赋予 agent 生命的循环与提示词。
summary.en: The loop and the prompt that give the agent life.

theProblem.zh: 模型只会输出文本，不会自己执行、看不到结果就停了。
theProblem.en: The model only emits text; it won't run anything or react to results.

objective.zh: 理解模型与工具之间的循环。
objective.en: Understand the loop between model and tools.

theProblem.zh: 同一个模型，换句话开场表现就不同。
theProblem.en: Same model, different opening — different behavior.

objective.zh: 看清系统提示词如何设定行为。
objective.en: See how the system prompt sets behavior.

theProblem.zh: 模型只会输出文本，不会自己执行、看不到结果就停了。
theProblem.en: The model only emits text; it won't run anything or react to results.

objective.zh: 理解模型与工具之间的循环。
objective.en: Understand the loop between model and tools.

theProblem.zh: 同一个模型，换句话开场表现就不同。
theProblem.en: Same model, different opening — different behavior.

objective.zh: 看清系统提示词如何设定行为。
objective.en: See how the system prompt sets behavior.

principle.zh: 循环让模型从「说」变成「做」。
principle.en: The loop turns the model from talking into doing.

problem.zh: 大模型只会输出文本。你想让它读写文件，它却停在这——差距就在「循环」。
problem.en: An LLM only emits text. You want it to read/write files, but it stops there — the gap is the loop.

solution.zh: 一个 while(true)：模型调工具就继续，不调就停。
solution.en: A while(true): keep going while the model calls tools, stop when it doesn't.

diagram.diagram:
flowchart LR
  user["用户消息"] --> model["调用模型"]
  model --> check{"有 tool_use?"}
  check -->|"有"| exec["执行工具"] --> model
  check -->|"无"| done["返回结果"]

desc.zh: 把用户问题作为第一条消息，连同工具定义发给模型。
desc.en: Send the user's question plus tool definitions to the model.

desc.zh: 没有 tool_use 就返回，否则把模型回答追加进消息。
desc.en: Return if there's no tool_use; otherwise append the model's reply.

desc.zh: 真实仓库里循环在 loop.ts 的 loop() 中，还多了工具结果回传与错误处理。
desc.en: In the real repo the loop lives in loop.ts's loop(), with tool-result feedback and error handling added.

code.snippet:
while (true) {
  const response = await callModel({ systemPrompt, messages });

deepDive.zh:
## 为什么是循环
模型只会输出文本；没有循环，它只能「说」不能「做」。把模型调用放进 while，让它读到工具结果后继续决策，才把"对话"变成"执行"。

## 取舍
- 用"是否还有 tool_use"判断停止，而不是让模型显式说"我做完了"——更稳，不依赖措辞。
- 教学版一次只跑一个工具、不做并行，换来代码清晰。

## 与真实实现的差距
真实仓库在循环外还包了不少东西：
- 工具结果要以 `role:"tool"` 消息回传，并处理报错与重试。
- 上下文过长要做 compaction 压缩。
- 加了超时、中断、权限校验。

这些都挂在循环外围，循环本身始终不变。

## 边界与坑
模型可能反复调用同一个工具陷入死循环——真实实现会加步数上限或重复检测。
deepDive.en:
## Why a loop
An LLM only emits text; without a loop it can only "talk", not "act". Wrapping the model call in a while loop — so it reads tool results and keeps deciding — is what turns a conversation into execution.

## Trade-offs
- Stop on "no more tool_use" rather than asking the model to say "I'm done" — sturdier, not wording-dependent.
- The teaching version runs one tool at a time, no parallelism, trading throughput for clarity.

## Gap from the real implementation
The real repo wraps a lot around this loop:
- Tool results must be fed back as `role:"tool"` messages, with error handling and retries.
- Long context needs compaction.
- Timeouts, cancellation, and permission checks are added.

All of it hangs around the loop — the loop itself never changes.

## Edges & gotchas
The model can loop forever calling the same tool — the real implementation adds a step cap or repeat detection.

tryIt.zh:
npx tsx s01_agent_loop/code.ts
试试：让模型列出当前目录的 Python 文件
观察：模型什么时候调工具（循环继续），什么时候不调（结束）
tryIt.en:
npx tsx s01_agent_loop/code.ts
Try: ask the model to list Python files in this directory
Watch: when does it call a tool (loop continues) vs not (loop ends)?

principle.zh: 提示词是 agent 的宪法。
principle.en: The prompt is the agent's constitution.

problem.zh: 同一个模型，表现不同——系统提示词在第一轮之前就定下基调。
problem.en: Same model, different behavior — the system prompt sets the tone before turn one.

solution.zh: 把行为规则写成常量，注入 system 字段。
solution.en: Encode the behavioral rules as a constant, injected into the system field.

caption.en: The system prompt sets the tone

diagram.diagram:
flowchart TD
  sys["系统提示词"] --> behavior["模型行为基调"]
  user["用户消息"] --> behavior

desc.zh: 规则写成常量，循环里把它作为 systemPrompt 传给模型。
desc.en: Rules as a constant, passed into the loop as systemPrompt.

code.snippet: const systemPrompt = "You are nano-agent. Use tools to read and write files.";

desc.zh: 真实仓库把系统提示词单独放在 prompt.ts，便于迭代与拼接。
desc.en: The real repo keeps the system prompt in its own prompt.ts for easy iteration and composition.

deepDive.zh:
## 为什么放在 system
system 字段在第一轮之前就定下基调，权重高于普通用户消息。把行为规则放这里，比每轮重复叮嘱更省 token、更稳定。

## 取舍
- 写成常量 vs 模板拼接：常量简单、可读；真实项目常按工具集/权限动态拼接。
- 关键规则放开头和结尾——模型对首尾更敏感。

## 与真实实现的差距
真实仓库的 system prompt 往往上千行，按场景拼接工具说明、安全边界、环境信息；教学版只留一句，够说明"它如何设定行为"。

## 边界与坑
改一句话就可能显著改变行为，却几乎不增加代码——杠杆极高，也意味着容易踩坑，需要回归测试。
deepDive.en:
## Why put it in system
The system field sets the tone before turn one and outweighs ordinary user messages. Putting behavioral rules here is cheaper (tokens) and steadier than re-stating them every turn.

## Trade-offs
- Constant vs templated: a constant is simple and readable; real projects assemble it dynamically by toolset/permissions.
- Put key rules at the start AND end — models weight the edges more.

## Gap from the real implementation
A real repo's system prompt is often thousands of lines, composing tool docs, safety boundaries, and environment info per scenario; the teaching version keeps one line — enough to show "how it sets behavior".

## Edges & gotchas
One sentence can shift behavior dramatically at near-zero code cost — huge leverage, but also easy to break, so it needs regression tests.

tryIt.zh:
改 systemPrompt 的内容，看模型行为如何变化
把关键规则同时放在开头和结尾，对比效果
tryIt.en:
Edit systemPrompt and watch behavior change
Put a key rule at both the start and the end; compare
